Title: Today hero dashboard
Description: Daily dashboard with selected date, steps, goal progress, distance, burn, workout minutes, and weather context.

Title: Today date navigation
Description: Move backward and forward through daily summaries without changing the rest of the app state unexpectedly.

Title: Apple Health onboarding
Description: Ask for HealthKit read permission and explain steps, distance, calories, and workout access clearly.

Title: Sample data preview
Description: Allow the app to run with mock data when HealthKit is unavailable or permissions are not granted.

Title: HealthKit aggregation
Description: Read steps, distance, active energy, flights, workouts, heart rate, and routes from Apple Health.

Title: Hourly steps timetable
Description: Show a chart of steps throughout the selected day so movement timing is visible at a glance.

Title: Weather in Fahrenheit
Description: Show workout/day weather context in Fahrenheit for Tyron and Tiffany's usage.

Title: Today Coach
Description: Personal coaching card with steps left, pace context, recent behavior, and household hints.

Title: Daily share card
Description: Generate a compact shareable day receipt with movement and workout totals.

Title: Activity day history
Description: Scrollable history of days with daily totals and drill-in details.

Title: Workout filters
Description: Filter workouts around frequent types: stair stepper, strength training, outdoor walk, indoor walk, and other.

Title: Workout detail screen
Description: Detailed workout page with duration, distance, burn, steps, pace, effort, and weather when available.

Title: Heart-rate chart
Description: Show average HR, max HR, and a workout heart-rate chart when HealthKit heart-rate samples exist.

Title: Heart-rate zones
Description: Summarize workout and cardio time in default BPM zones, with app-level zone configuration.

Title: Workout share cards
Description: Workout-specific share cards for strength, stair stepper, indoor/outdoor walking, and other workouts.

Title: Outdoor route maps
Description: Show route maps for outdoor HealthKit workouts when route data is available locally.

Title: Workout templates and tags
Description: Tag workouts with training labels such as Push Day, Pull Day, Leg Day, Stair Session, Outdoor Walk, and Indoor Walk.

Title: Workout comparison
Description: Compare a workout against recent similar sessions and show baseline context.

Title: Insight receipts
Description: Day, week, and month receipts with steps, distance, burn, workout time, averages, and goal progress.

Title: Insights period navigation
Description: Move Day, Week, and Month insight periods backward and forward without changing Today.

Title: Monday-first weeks
Description: Use Monday as the start of week for week-based insights and summaries.

Title: Activity heat map
Description: Visual heat map for week/month consistency and movement intensity.

Title: Cardio insight card
Description: Cardio summary for walking, running, cycling, stairs, hiking, swimming, elliptical, and rowing workouts.

Title: Cardio detail drill-down
Description: Detailed cardio view with totals, zone time, best session, and cardio workout list.

Title: Strength insight card
Description: Strength summary with session count, duration, burn, heart-rate context, and best session.

Title: Household compete board
Description: Simple household competition surface for Tyron and Tiffany with leaderboard and gap context.

Title: Invite-code competition flow
Description: Generate, copy, share, paste, and join household competition invite codes.

Title: Aggregate CloudKit competition sync
Description: Sync only aggregate competition totals through CloudKit, not raw HealthKit samples.

Title: Daily step Live Activity
Description: Lock Screen/Dynamic Island Live Activity for current steps, goal percent, and progress.

Title: Background HealthKit delivery
Description: Enable HealthKit background delivery to refresh today and the Live Activity when iOS wakes the app.

Title: Apple Watch aggregate sync
Description: Publish aggregate activity snapshots to the watch companion surfaces.

Title: App Intents shortcuts
Description: Expose app intents for today steps, opening Compete, and syncing the household board.

Title: Settings diagnostics
Description: Show version, HealthKit status, refresh state, iCloud state, Live Activity state, and copyable diagnostics.

Title: Persistent view choices
Description: Remember Activity mode/filter/sort, workout filter, and Insights selected scope.

Title: Pull-to-refresh
Description: Add pull-to-refresh to Today, Activity, and Insights while keeping compact loading states.

Title: Privacy manifest
Description: Include required Apple privacy manifest entries for app-store readiness.

Title: TestFlight runbook
Description: Document device proof, App Store Connect, TestFlight beta, and privacy-label steps.

Title: GitHub CI workflow
Description: Run core Swift checks and iOS tests through GitHub Actions for regression coverage.

Title: Local device install scripts
Description: Keep repeatable scripts for local and production iPhone installation flows.

Title: StrideSlip project documentation
Description: README and docs describe the privacy model, architecture, product surfaces, and setup flow.
